title: Transient Transfection of Creolimax fragrantissima Using Lonza Nucleofector
author: Aleksandra Kozyczkowska
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.r65d9g6
materials: Carefully & without creating bubbles In total 20-22ul

steps.title: 300ul of culture + 9ml of...
steps.instruction: 300ul of culture + 9ml of Marine Broth in a 25cm2 flask

steps.title: If there are more conditions, it...
steps.instruction: If there are more conditions, it is recommended to pull the cells together to get more visible pellet

steps.title: P3 PrimaryCell 4D-Nucleofector Kit S (32...
steps.instruction: P3 PrimaryCell 4D-Nucleofector Kit S (32 rxn) Kit Catalog# H3V4XP-5032 It is recommended not to keep the cells in P3 buffer for too long

steps.title: Our plasmid contains sequence coding H2B-Venus...
steps.instruction: Our plasmid contains sequence coding H2B-Venus under tubulin promoter It is recommended to have a highly concentrated plasmid
